roa.docketEntryComment: PITCHESS IN CAMERA HRNG CONDUCTED ON 12-30-15 BY JUDGE CROMPTON,CSR J PRIOR 	129,PITCHESS PROTECTIVE ORDER SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S EC1043 PITCHESS (SFPD) NOTICE, MOTION, PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED

/CAL:DEF EC 1043 PITCHESS MOTION - SFPD/NP/X:THE MATTER IS HEARD BY THE HONORABLE CHARLES CROMPTON, CSR PATRICIA DOWLING #5388/X:RONNIE WAGNER IS PRESENT ON BEHALF OF SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT,/X:THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED A STIPULATION,  THE WRITTEN STIPULATION IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,//X POLICE LEGAL SHALL DELIVER RELEVANT MATERIALS TO THE CT FOR REVIEW BY12-23-15; MATERIALS, IF ANY, SHALL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENSE BY 01-06-16,/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPO/X:ATTORNEY PETER FURST DECLARES A CONFLICT/CTORD:THE COURT APPOINTS RUTH EDELSTEIN AS NEW CONFLICT COUNSEL/CTORD:TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 10-07-15/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:PEOPLE FILE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:08-10-15/987,2/X:DEF MOTIONFOR OWN RECOGNIZANCE IS DENIED BY THE COURT/X:BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLYSET/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/MO138572:16014009/BE/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD: TO SET/DOP/
/CAL:TO JOIN 16005223/VD:PX ON 3-28-16/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET OR DISPO/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & STATUS OF PITCHESS/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & STATUS OF PITCHESS MOTION/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CTORD:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE IS GRANTED//CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING OR DISPO ON 09-11-15/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 08-17-15/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/
